ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* API URL for data ingestion */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees charged by the exchange (e.g., trading fees, withdrawal fees) */,
  "withdrawal_limits" TEXT /* Withdrawal limits for each cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the exchange was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain on which the cryptocurrency operates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base cryptocurrency in the trading pair */,
  "quote_crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote cryptocurrency in the trading pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trading pair is listed */,
  "min_order_size" REAL /* Minimum order size for the trading pair */,
  "max_order_size" REAL /* Maximum order size for the trading pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trading pair was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trading pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_quote_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the trading pair */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the trading pair */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the trading pair */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the trading pair */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume traded */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Close time of the data entry */,
  "quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Volume of the quote asset traded */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed */,
  "taker_buy_base_asset_volume" REAL /* Volume of base asset traded by takers */,
  "taker_buy_quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Volume of quote asset traded by takers */,
  "ignore" INTEGER /* Ignore flag for data entry */,
  "candlestick_pattern" TEXT /* Candlestick pattern (e.g., hammer, engulfing) */,
  "technical_indicators" TEXT /* Technical indicators (e.g., moving averages, RSI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "maker_taker" TEXT /* Maker or taker of the trade */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, web) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Slippage for the trade (e.g., due to market volatility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code for the user */,
  "affiliate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate who referred the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was last updated */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* Backtest results for the strategy (e.g., profit/loss, Sharpe ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy parameter */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., numeric, string) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_parameters_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy execution */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy being executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the execution */,
  "trade_ids" TEXT /* List of trade IDs executed by the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_executions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade executed by a strategy */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy execution */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "maker_taker" TEXT /* Maker or taker of the trade */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, web) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Slippage for the trade (e.g., due to market volatility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_trades_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES strategy_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report generation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report (e.g., date range, indicators) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the platform */,
  "secret_key" TEXT /* Secret key for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last used */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the API key (e.g., read-only, trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access log entry */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key used for access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the API access */,
  "api_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint accessed */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Request body sent with the API request */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Response body received from the API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_logs_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API limit */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key */,
  "request_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed within the time window */,
  "time_window" TEXT /* Time window for the rate limit (e.g., 1 minute, 1 hour) */,
  "reset_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next reset time */,
  "remaining_requests" INTEGER /* Number of remaining requests for the current time window */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_limits_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deposit_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deposit address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the deposit address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Deposit address for the user */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the deposit address (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deposit address was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawal_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the withdrawal request */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address to which the withdrawal is being sent */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the withdrawal (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the withdrawal */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the withdrawal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the withdrawal request (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the withdrawal request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawal_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the support ticket */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the support ticket */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the support ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the support ticket (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the support ticket was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
